news.summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices, the company behind the S&P 500, launched a new crypto benchmark this week with investment firm Pantera Capital. news.title: Samsung unveils wider foldable phone, hikes prices as chip costs rise
news.summary: Samsung Electronics on Wednesday unveiled a passport-sized foldable phone and raised prices of two updated foldable models, as it grapples ‌with rising memory chip prices while bracing for a new threat from Apple ‌in the niche but growing segment.  The South Korean technology company pioneered foldable smartphones but its dominance is set to ​be challenged by Apple which analysts expect this year to launch a foldable phone with a screen similar in size to an iPad mini.  "Strategically, this is one of Samsung's most important foldable launches," said Francisco Jeronimo, vice president at researcher IDC.

news.title: This Week In Electric Vehicles - Wiring Harness Market Growth Driven By Advanced Automotive Technologies
news.summary: The automotive wiring harness market is poised for growth, projected to increase from USD 42.95 billion in 2026 to USD 49.29 billion by 2033. This expansion is largely driven by the transition to zonal electrical/electronic (E/E) architectures and the increasing adoption of electric vehicles (EVs), advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS), and autonomous driving technologies.
